subcodes.first_line: The hour hath struck, and the Resurrection is come to pass, while the people gaze but perceive not. The Call hath been raised betwixt earth and heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد قضت الساعه و قامت القیمه و الناس ینظرون و لایشعرون قد ارتفع الندآء بین الارض و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @empty learning; false spirituality, @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @suffering and imprisonment, @Word of God and human limitations, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
